articles.title: As Soccer Grows In America The World Cup Is Becoming A Luxury Event
articles.description: The 2026 World Cup's glitzy halftime show is the latest effort to Americanize soccer. The sport has taken root, but Trump ties and pricey tickets are curbing enthusiasm.
